pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 bytecode, which may not be compatible with the target runtime or may fail if the build environment enforces JDK 17 strictness.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven.compiler.release property to ensure cross-compilation compatibility with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target alone can lead to subtle class file compatibility issues; release=17 ensures the generated bytecode is strictly compatible with Java 17 APIs.
